overall.description: First-person exploration of a cyberpunk apartment from Cyberpunk 2077, featuring dramatic lighting transitions from cyan neon office to dark corridors to a warm candle-lit shrine room. The player character moves slowly through the space, examining details and eventually interacting with an item.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk apartment office with cyan neon desk lighting

agents.ego_description: slowly moving through the apartment office, examining the desk area illuminated by cyan LED strips

entered.detail: tall black server cabinet with glowing indicators
L-shaped desk with bright cyan LED strip lighting along edges
red and black chair in front of the desk
large window with horizontal blinds showing dark city outside
scattered documents and a tablet on the desk surface

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a compact cyberpunk apartment office bathed in cyan neon light. The camera moves slowly around an L-shaped desk with glowing LED edges, revealing a server rack, scattered papers, and a chair. The space is narrow and enclosed with no visible sky, creating an intimate, high-tech atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark corridor leading to apartment exit with magenta accent lighting

events.description: transitioning from bright cyan neon office to darker corridor with subtle magenta lighting accents

agents.ego_description: walking through the darkened corridor toward the apartment exit door, passing control panels and equipment

entered.detail: wall-mounted panel with glowing red and blue indicators
dark doorway leading to corridor with city lights visible through window
poster on wall showing a figure in action pose

segments.scene_description: The camera moves from the office into a darker corridor with low ambient lighting and magenta accents. The server rack recedes to the left as the camera approaches a doorway revealing distant city lights. Control panels and a poster adorn the walls as the space transitions from the bright workspace to a more subdued transitional area.

scene_state.functional_zone: meditation shrine room with warm candle lighting and paper lantern

events.description: dramatic shift from cool dark corridor to warm orange candle-lit room
game UI popup appears for INSTANTANO COFFEE item interaction

agents.ego_description: approaching the shrine altar with candles and incense, interacting with items on the table

entered.detail: tall rectangular paper lantern emitting warm white light
low table covered with lit candles and a bonsai tree
small altar with multiple burning candles, incense burner, and offerings
ceramic burner with visible smoke rising
small potted tree on the candle table

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions dramatically to a warm, intimate space illuminated by candlelight and a paper lantern. The camera moves through a meditation shrine area featuring a bonsai tree, multiple lit candles, and an incense burner with rising smoke. A game UI element appears indicating an interactive coffee item. The atmosphere shifts from high-tech neon to traditional, spiritual warmth.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a high-tech cyberpunk apartment that transforms from a cold, neon-lit office into a warm, spiritual sanctuary. It begins in a compact workspace bathed in cyan light, gliding past an L-shaped desk with glowing LED edges and a server rack. As the camera leaves the office, the scene shifts into a darker corridor where the bright cyan fades into subdued magenta accents and low ambient lighting. The space then opens dramatically into a meditation shrine, where the high-tech atmosphere is replaced by the soft glow of candlelight and a paper lantern. Finally, the camera moves past a bonsai tree and rising incense smoke toward an interactive coffee item, completing the transition from a sterile digital environment to traditional warmth.
